author: Horse
body:
Monday morning…. and I’m thoroughly hating your guts Burgo

fyi

author: nicky hirschberg
body:
I would love to book Dave McMillan for a gig or two, how do i get hold of him or his manager!?  
Please reply to this e-mail address when you are back from paradise!  
many thanks  
Nicky!

author: Burgo
body:
@ Horse:  
Haha. No sympathy from me mate.

@ Nicky:  
I’ll drop you a line once I’ve chatted to Dave. Expect an email soon.
